# Cancellation.IsDiscoverMethod method

Returns `true` when *method* names the `server/discover` handshake, which MUST NOT be cancelled by a client. Mirrors TS `isDiscoverMethod`. (R-15.2.2-b)

```csharp
public static bool IsDiscoverMethod(string method)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| method | The method name. |

## Return Value

`true` when it is the discover method.
